chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2242 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 13-10-2025 Mr. Ubedullah Malano, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Moiz0u-Din Qureshi, Advocate for respondents No.2&3. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, D.A.G. **** Counsel for respondents No.2&3 files statement along with a copy of letter dated 25.09.2025 and submits that appeal filed by the petitioner regarding the subject property is pending adjudication before the Court of Administrator (SZ), Evacuee Trust Property, Karachi. Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that the petitioner will pursue his above appeal, which is already pending adjudication. Order accordingly. Instant petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
